The 31–123 Dev Gauntlet™

End-to-end codebase review, testing, hardening roadmap, and real-world valuation certificate. No demo theater. We verify how your product behaves under real developer usage, then issue a version/commit-locked Valuation Certificate with a boring, evidence-backed engineering report. Optional: we can deliver fixes back to you via Git PRs or a clean versioned ZIP — you keep full creative control, always.

Get a Quote + Start Intake See Deliverables Certificate Preview
Testing cohort31 / 63 / 123 developers
OutputReadiness scorecard + fix plan
ArtifactValuation Certificate (commit-locked)
ControlClient approves all merges
Architecture + security review Automated checks + reproducible harness Structured dev focus group testing Optional patch & return files

What’s included

  • Codebase Intake + Threat/Quality Model: repo access method, environments, definition-of-done, and “production ready” criteria locked to your context.
  • Deep Technical Scan: architecture boundaries, tenancy, auth/session model, data flow, dependency risk, secrets posture, operational risks.
  • Automated Testing Layer: build verification, lint/static checks (SAST-style), dependency + secret scanning patterns, targeted smoke & break tests, reproducible harness.
  • 31–123 Dev Gauntlet Focus Group: structured developer testing cohort with standardized scripts and measurable outcomes (TTFS, crash rate, failure modes, repro reliability, dev friction logs).
  • Production Readiness Scorecard + Fix Plan: prioritized P0/P1/P2 backlog with acceptance criteria and implementation notes.
  • Valuation + Certificate Issuance: replacement-cost and completion-budget model + risk adjustment, tied to a specific version/commit.
  • Optional Patch Delivery: PRs (preferred) or a versioned ZIP with change log — client approves merges.

How it works (pipeline)

PhaseWhat happens
Phase 0 — Intake + scope lock
Access + environments + definition-of-done
 Repo access method, environments, threat/quality model, and “production ready” criteria locked to your context.
Phase 1 — Architecture + code audit
Static + structural review
 Boundaries, state, auth/session model, tenancy, data flow, dependency risk, secrets posture, operational risk scan.
Phase 2 — Automated test layer
Repeatable harness
 Build verification, targeted smoke tests, SAST-style checks, dependency/secret scanning patterns, failure triage.
Phase 3 — 31–123 Dev Gauntlet
Real developer usage
 Structured focus-group cohort testing with standardized scripts and measured outcomes (TTFS, crash rate, repro reliability).
Phase 4 — Scorecard + hardening plan
P0/P1/P2
 P0/P1/P2 findings with acceptance criteria, risk impact, and recommended fixes (including what’s already strong).
Phase 5 — Valuation + certificate
Commit-locked
 Replacement cost, completion budget, readiness-adjusted appraisal range, and a signed valuation certificate tied to a specific commit.

Pricing

All packages include NDA, confidentiality controls, and a version/commit-locked report. Pricing scales with repo size, deployment complexity, and required test matrix.

Package Includes Timeline Investment
Signal Scan

Valuation Certificate

Your certificate is tied to a specific version/commit and includes a summary of verified specs, readiness findings, and the appraisal range with methodology. It is an evidence-backed appraisal — not a warranty.

Intake Form

Fill this out and click Generate Intake Packet. You’ll get a copy-ready JSON packet you can email to: SkyesOverLondonLC@solenterprises.org.

Tip: hold Ctrl/⌘ to select multiple.
Send to: SkyesOverLondonLC@solenterprises.org | Phone: +1 (480) 469-5416 | Website: SOLEnterprises.org

Client protections: client retains full IP, ownership, and creative direction at all times. We work in a branch/PR model (preferred) or deliver a versioned ZIP. We do not publish or redistribute your code. Confidentiality and access rules are documented in the engagement terms. Local-only mode is available if required.
